violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

ROP crabmeat observed thawing in the walk-in cooler in its original package. When thawing, ROP foods must be removed from packaging to allow oxygen to enter for food safety. Temperature of ROP crabmeat observed at 37 degrees F. Crabmeat was removed from packaging during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
